utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: 1) health_coverage: present with both physical and mental health insurance and costs. 2) property_coverage: present with home/contents insurance and costs. 3) travel_coverage: present with travel insurance and costs. 4) additional_services: present with services and costs. 5) total_budget: present with monthly/annual cost breakdown. Each item includes the required details (type of coverage/service and explicit costs, and a total budget breakdown). Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item in the final coverage plan and find the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings, then return its numeric rating. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents) -> property_protection.home_content rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance rating 9; Emergency Mental Health Care (add-on) -> health_enhancement_services rating 8; Technology Protection (Property Enhancement) -> property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection rating 6; Premium Medical Network (Travel Enhancement) -> travel_enhancement_services.Premium Medical Network rating 7.
